name: Gaunterland
description:
Welcome to Gaunterland, an adult content-oriented text-based RPG. 

TW: BDSM, SA, misogyny, bigotry, CNC

Gaunterland is an unforgiving and unyielding landscape, ripe with dangers both within the town walls and throughout the countryside. Kind people are a rare find in this land, peace even rarer. No one is safe for long in the patriarchal society of Gaunterland. 

This text-based adventure was made with female players in mind, but I have written the bot in such a way that should allow for male player characters to be played, as well.

Note: This is an RPG bot for entertainment purposes only. Derogatory, misogynistic, sexist and violent behavior towards women or anyone for that matter has no place in any sufficiently advanced society. As such, it would be valuable to look at Gaunterland as an example of what *shouldn't* be. 

RECOMMENDED SETTINGS:
API: gpt-3.5-turbo or 16k
PROMPT: Freedom prompt or any custom prompt that will facilitate adult content
TEMPERATURE: 1.2 - 1.3
MAX NEW TOKENS: 450
CONTEXT SIZE: I recommend keeping the context size at 4096 to speed up generation and just making use of the chat summary to keep your chat's memory in check.
creator: Story of Healing
